; All sprite definitions for SMS Roguelike
; Each row is 16 hex digits (palette 1 color indices)
; 0=transparent 1=dk green 2=mid green 3=lime 4=white
; 5=red 6=dk red 7=brown 8=lt brown 9=pink
; A=olive B=ylw-green C=brt lime D=warm grey E=teal F=yellow

@PlayerSpr1Data ; Frog player frame 1 - big round head, red hat, huge eyes
0000000000000000
0006655555560000
0065555555556000
0335533333553300
0344032223044300
0344023323044300
0233322222333200
0223221221232200
0122222222222100
0013222222231000
0301222222210300
0012212121221000
0001210001210000
0002100001020000
0000000000000000
0000000000000000
